ground_truth_fix: TL;DR. Your program is too complex for the verifier to analyze, as it must iterate over more than 1 million instructions to verify the full program. The verifier errors because it already analyzed 1 million instructions. Hence it reached the limit and is giving up. This verifier error is indeed a bit misleading. The BPF program isn't actually too large. The number of instructions the verifier has to analyze is different from the number of instructions in the whole program because the verifier has to analyze each and every path through the program. Therefore, it may analyze the same instruct...

candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Split the program with tail calls or reduce branching and loop work
candidate_repairs.rationale: No earlier dominating proof-establishing branch or narrowing was found.
